frontmatter.title: Git Presentation
frontmatter.description: Introduction to git from the aspect of a TFVC developer

markdownRemark.excerpt: I recently gave a presentation to the other developers in my team that introduced them to git. The presentation is targeted at developers who use TFVC as this …
markdownRemark.html: I recently gave a presentation to the other developers in my team that introduced them to git. The presentation is targeted at developers who use TFVC as this is what everyone in the team currently uses.
